Package index

All functions

arithmetic()
Arithmetic series
as.double(<discretes>)
Convert a numeric series to a numeric vector
as_discretes()
Create a numeric series from a numeric vector
as_integerish()
"Safely" convert to integer-like
dsct_linear()
Linearly transform a numeric series
dsct_power()
Raise a numeric series to a power
dsct_union()
Combine numeric series
empty_series()
Create an empty numeric series
dsct_raise() dsct_exp()
Exponentiation of a numeric series
get_discretes_at() get_discretes_in()
Extract discrete values from a numeric series
has_discretes()
Test if values are discrete values in a numeric series
has_sink_in() has_sink_at()
Test for sinks in a numeric series
integers() natural1() natural0()
Integer numeric series
is_between()
Check if values are between two bounds
is_series()
Check if an object is treated as a numeric series
dsct_log()
Logarithm of a numeric series
has_negative_zero() has_positive_zero()
Check if a numeric series has a signed zero
next_discrete() prev_discrete()
Traversing a numeric series
num_discretes()
Number of discrete values in a series
plot(<discretes>)
Plot a numeric series
print(<discretes>)
Print a numeric series
representative()
Get a representative discrete value in a numeric series
sinks()
Sinks
dsct_drop() dsct_keep()
Subset a numeric series
dsct_transform()
Monotonically transform a numeric series
zeroes_vector()
Construct vector of zeroes
